/usr/bin/cc  -fsanitize=address -fsanitize-recover=address -g "CMakeFiles/CWE121_Stack_Based_Buffer_Overflow__src_char_declare_cpy_07-bad.dir/s09/CWE121_Stack_Based_Buffer_Overflow__src_char_declare_cpy_07.c.o" -o /home/loris/Desktop/TestRepositories/Forked/juliet-test-suite-c/Edited/bin/CWE121/bad/CWE121_Stack_Based_Buffer_Overflow__src_char_declare_cpy_07-bad  /home/loris/Desktop/TestRepositories/Forked/juliet-test-suite-c/Edited/bin/support/libsupport.a -lpthread -lm
